testcase.name: passing-test
testcase.system-out: [0.000s] Creating test network [0.650s] [api] Service is healthy [0.840s] Status code equals 200

testcase.name: failing-test
testcase.failure: $.name equals John Expected: John Actual: Jane

testcase.name: error-test

error.message: container startup failed: image not found

testcase.error: container startup failed: image not found
testcase.system-err: container startup failed: image not found
